title: SEALAPACK® Oven & BBQ Flavour Lock Bags, Pack of 8
features: HEALTHY COOKING: Sealapack Bags, perfect for meat, fish or vegetables, lock in the flavour in the foil bags during cooking in the oven, on a grill, hot plate or BBQ
FLAVOUR LOCK: Retain moisture and flavour. Add your favourite marinade, herbs, spices or sauce to the bag with fish, meat or vegetables, seal and cook.
CLEAN COOKING: After cooking, carefully open the bag, servce the contents and dispose of the bag in household waste bin. No washing up !
MIXED GRILL COOKING: Perfect to ensure that all types of food can be cooked at the same time on the same BBQ or appiance without mixing meat with fish or vegetarian options
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 8 BAGS
description: Sealapack Bags, perfect for meat, fish or vegetables, lock in the flavour in the foil bags during cooking in the oven, on a grill, hot plate or BBQ. Add your favourite marinade, herbs, spices or sauce to the bag with fish, meat or vegetables, seal and cook. Perfect to ensure that all types of food can be cooked on the same BBQ without mixing meat with fish or vegetarian options. Pack of 8 single use bags.
